title: ComputeRoadmap: layer waves on the union of blocked_by and after edges
description:
Make the roadmap wave layout respect soft ordering while keeping feasibility statuses hard-only.

Context: internal/query/roadmap.go ComputeRoadmap layers epics into waves with Kahn topological layering over epic-only blocked_by edges (epicBlockers map, ~lines 85-117), and epicConsumerStatus derives "queued" from those same edges (~lines 219-230). Cycles flush to a final wave. The Tick struct now has After []string (json "after,omitempty") — soft ordering: preference only, never feasibility; missing/closed targets ignored.

Work:
- Wave layering: build the Kahn edge set from the UNION of epic-only blocked_by and epic-only after entries (dedupe ids appearing in both; non-epic and missing targets ignored, as today). Cycle-flush behavior unchanged, now over the union graph.
- Status: queued must keep consulting hard (blocked_by) edges only. An epic whose only open predecessors are after-targets is NOT queued — it stays ready/active/gated per the existing rules. No new status values.
- RoadmapEpic: add After []string (json "after,omitempty", epic-only targets) parallel to BlockedBy, so renderers and GET /api/roadmap consumers can distinguish edge types. The tickboard server endpoint serializes query.Roadmap directly, so the API picks this up with no server change.

Test cases (extend internal/query/roadmap_test.go):
- Epics A, B where B has after [A]: B lands in wave 1; B status ready (not queued) while A open; B.After == [A].
- Chain A <- B (blocked_by A) <- C (after B), A in_progress: waves [A],[B],[C]; B queued, C ready.
- Union cycle (A after B, B blocked_by A) -> both flushed to the final wave, no infinite loop.
- after entry pointing at a task or missing id -> ignored for layering and absent from RoadmapEpic.After.

Files likely touched: internal/query/roadmap.go, internal/query/roadmap_test.go.
Run: go test ./internal/query/...
acceptance_criteria: waves layer on the union of hard and soft epic edges; queued derives from blocked_by only; RoadmapEpic carries After; go test ./internal/query/... passes
